title: Exquisite Russian Salmon Ceviche
description: A peppery, flaky salmon ceviche with shio‑koji cure and rice vinegar, served as a solo dinner that respects FODMAP guidelines.
instructions: Slice fresh salmon into 1/2‑inch cubes and place in a glass bowl.
Whisk together rice vinegar, lemon juice, and a splash of water to create a bright acidic solution.
Pour the acid mixture over the salmon, cover, and refrigerate for 20 minutes to cure the fish.
While the salmon cures, dice cucumber and avocado into bite‑sized cubes.
Drain the salmon and gently fold in the cucumber, avocado, and shio‑koji.
Sprinkle finely chopped dill, pepper, and a pinch of sea salt over the ceviche and stir lightly.
Let the mixture rest for an additional 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Plate the ceviche on chilled ceramic bowls and garnish with optional edible flowers if desired.
Serve immediately with a side of crisp lettuce leaves for a refreshing finish.
